nodes.title: Prompt Negative (shared)
widgets_values: different character, wrong face, face drift, asymmetrical face swap, low quality, blurry, deformed, watermark, text, signature, depth of field, photoreal, smooth shading, gradients, anti-aliased edges, noisy texture, extra colors outside palette, wrong facing direction, wrong pose

nodes.title: Prompt + N
widgets_values: same hero character as reference image, preserve face and identity, full body, walk cycle frame A, facing north, back view only, facing away from camera, ONLY this orientation, match openpose skeleton exactly, Chrono Trigger inspired 16-bit JRPG sprite, clean pixel clusters, crisp silhouette, no anti-aliasing, simple flat shading, readable at 36x36, direction N
